result.stdout:
Usage:
  IconResizeUtility.App [options] [command]

Options:
  --version         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

Commands:
  resize

commands.payload:
Usage:
  IconResizeUtility.App [options] [command]

Options:
  --version         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

Commands:
  resize

result.stdout:
Usage:
  IconResizeUtility.App resize [options]

Options:
  --type <type> (REQUIRED)              droid or ios
  --srcFolder <srcFolder> (REQUIRED)    Folder where the source images are located
  --dstFolder <dstFolder> (REQUIRED)    Folder where the results image are written to
  --prefix <prefix>                     Optional, prefix icon name
  --iconSize <iconSize>                 Optional, provide specific icon size. If non provided the default sizes where used. e.g. 18,24,48
  --postfixSize                         Optional, postfix icon size. Required if multiple sizes where choosen
  --csproj <csproj>                     Optional, full path to the Xamarin .csproj file where the icons should be added
  --color <color>                       Optional, single color like "#55FF5560" or multiple colors like "{"red":"#FF0000","green":"#00FF00"}"
  --doNotRename                         Avoid replacing invalid characters in the icon name with an '_'
  --useCache                            Use cache to improve resize performance
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Usage:
  IconResizeUtility.App resize [options]

Options:
  --type <type> (REQUIRED)              droid or ios
  --srcFolder <srcFolder> (REQUIRED)    Folder where the source images are located
  --dstFolder <dstFolder> (REQUIRED)    Folder where the results image are written to
  --prefix <prefix>                     Optional, prefix icon name
  --iconSize <iconSize>                 Optional, provide specific icon size. If non provided the default sizes where used. e.g. 18,24,48
  --postfixSize                         Optional, postfix icon size. Required if multiple sizes where choosen
  --csproj <csproj>                     Optional, full path to the Xamarin .csproj file where the icons should be added
  --color <color>                       Optional, single color like "#55FF5560" or multiple colors like "{"red":"#FF0000","green":"#00FF00"}"
  --doNotRename                         Avoid replacing invalid characters in the icon name with an '_'
  --useCache                            Use cache to improve resize performance
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information
